hooks.command: if command -v sqlfluff >/dev/null 2>&1; then sqlfluff lint --disable-progress-bar .; else echo "sqlfluff not found — pip install sqlfluff to lint SQL/migrations (database-review)"; fi

echo "Reminder from database-review: schema/migration file edits need a documented rollback path (or explicit forward-only + remediation plan) and must not hold long locks on production-sized tables — batch backfills, build indexes concurrently, and avoid NOT NULL columns without a default on existing large tables."
echo "Before finishing, if you added/moved modules, changed commands, or shifted a convention, regenerate the system map (`baselane map .`) — see .baselane/system-map/README.md."
